subject: Revert "[COMMON] Fix some array bashisms"
commit_message:
Revert "[COMMON] Fix some array bashisms"

This reverts commit fb9dc874a2e6419cab4ed231743b3d405c753cb6.

Reason for revert: All gates / master are not working. Let's see if it's the root cause

Issue-ID: OOM-2643
Change-Id: Iab4631c85aaa79ee501abb27a4942efb32d61fbb
Signed-off-by: Sylvain Desbureaux <sylvain.desbureaux@orange.com>

the first gate on this patch was good
so the issue is not there
further investigation needed as it does not seem to be linked to a OOM patch (no real candidates - regression occured ~ 17th of December), it could be an upstream change?
